mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_info WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.tenant_id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.role_level, u.status, u.avatar_url, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.created_time, u.updated_time, tc.logo_url AS tenant_logo_url, tc.theme_color AS tenant_theme_color, tc.welcome_message AS tenant_welcome_message, tc.company_name AS tenant_company_name FROM user_info u LEFT JOIN tenant_config tc ON u.tenant_id = tc.tenant_id AND tc.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND u.deleted = 0
